jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Cuemath - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Teacher looking for your next big career move? Cuemath in Thane offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cuemath:
Cuemath is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cuemath!
